Please file a lost-package claim for me now.

args.query: site:ups.com file a claim lost package recipient UPS claims

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: File a UPS Claim

  - url: https://www.ups.com/us/en/support/file-a-claim

  - source: UPS

  - domain: ups.com


  ## Content


  UPS provides an online process for reporting lost or damaged packages. The page
  offers options to start a new claim, view an existing claim, or file as a guest.


  Before filing, UPS says a claim for a lost or damaged package should be started
  within 60 days of the scheduled delivery date. A tracking number is needed to begin.
  Customers should keep an invoice that can establish the value of the package, and
  damaged packages should be kept with their contents and packaging.


  Users who log in can manage claims through the claims dashboard. Recipients and
  third-party shippers may use the guest filing path. During review, UPS may send
  the shipper time-sensitive requests for additional information or photos. Unless
  more investigation is needed, a resolution commonly takes several business days.


  The FAQ lists circumstances that may prevent a claim from being submitted online.
  Examples include account restrictions imposed by the shipper, an unauthenticated
  account, certain released-package situations, and an investigation that is already
  open for the same issue. The page also describes claim statuses, supporting-document
  requests, and payment-document steps that may occur after a claim is approved.

  '
